case_title: LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY vs. CHANDLER PROPERTIES HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF APR-11-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-11-2001, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY AARON R FELDMAN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-30-2001 CONTINUED FROM APR-11-2001 TO JUN-13-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE 2 TO BE CHANDLER PROPERTIES (SUED AS DOE 2)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2001, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY FELDMAN AARON. HEARING SET FOR APR-11-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
